siteTagline: Premium holiday cottages · Jarosławiec, ul. Morska 11
heroDescription:
Twelve wooden cottages in a quiet, peaceful setting, 180 m from "Dubai" beach in Jarosławiec.
We welcome our guests personally. Checkout without rushing.
storyQuote: "We built them from spruce, in the shade of the birches that were already here."
storyBody1:
Our cottages are comfortable, year-round spaces of 50 m². Upstairs are two cosy bedrooms, and downstairs a living room with a fully equipped kitchen and a wooden terrace — perfect for morning coffee and evening relaxation.

On the grounds, a pool, volleyball court and attractions for the youngest await. Evenings can be spent in the charming wooden gazebo, made for shared relaxation and long conversations.

Pets are very welcome — we know that holidays are always better together.
storyBody2: Since 2022 we have been running this place with passion and dedication, creating the ideal retreat for families, couples and small groups seeking genuine rest by the sea — in a natural atmosphere, free from rush and artificiality.

featureItems.title: Wood & linen
featureItems.sub: Natural interiors, oak floors, linen curtains.

featureItems.title: Pine forest
featureItems.sub: Walk to the beach through the forest: 4 minutes.

featureItems.title: Private veranda
featureItems.sub: Each cottage has its own terrace with tree views.

featureItems.title: AC + WiFi 300 Mb/s
featureItems.sub: Remote work on holiday — no excuses.

cottageDescription: Twelve identical cottages — same character, same size, same price. No "better" or "worse" category, no view surcharge. Every booking delivers the same quality — 50 m² on two levels, private terrace, space for 4 + 2 guests.
clickRoomHint: Click a room to see a photo

salon.name: Living room + kitchen
salon.desc: Open-plan space with a soft sofa, dining table for six and a fully equipped kitchen. A tall window framing the trees; fireplace ready for cool evenings.

lazienka.name: Bathroom
lazienka.desc: Walk-in shower with rainfall head, heated floor and a full set of toiletries in refillable dispensers. Hairdryer and backlit mirror.

taras.name: Terrace with firepit
taras.desc: Wooden terrace with a large table, sun loungers and a private firepit. Firewood and charcoal are included — prepared every evening.

sypialnia1.name: Main bedroom
sypialnia1.desc: King bed 160 × 200 with linen bedding and a wool blanket. Birch-plank ceiling slope, window opening to the pines and east sunrise.

sypialnia2.name: Children's bedroom
sypialnia2.desc: Two beds 90 × 200 with an optional cot for the youngest. Warm lamplight, a shelf with books and board games for a rainy evening.

okoliceDescription: Jarosławiec is a small seaside town between Ustka and Darłowo, known for its wide beach, cliff coastline, historic lighthouse and the nearby Lake Wicko. The area also boasts a waterpark, seaside promenade and numerous walking trails.
testimonialQuote: A wonderful holiday in an ideal setting — well-maintained, surrounded by beautiful nature, with wonderful owners who made us feel welcome from day one. The cottages were clean, cosy and well-equipped, with every detail thought through for guests. We recommend it to anyone looking for a peaceful, family break close to nature.
footerTagline: Wooden holiday cottages in Jarosławiec. 180 m from the beach, for 4–6 guests. We welcome you personally.
metaDescription: Twelve wooden holiday cottages 180 m from the beach in Jarosławiec. For 4–6 people. We welcome guests personally.
ogDescription: Premium holiday cottages 180 m from the beach. Quiet. Natural. Personal.

regulaminSummary: Check-in 15:00 / check-out 10:00. 30% deposit, free cancellation up to 60 days. Quiet hours 22:00 – 07:00. Pets by arrangement. No smoking indoors. Use the firepit responsibly — firewood included.
regulaminFooterNote: Thank you for reading. If anything is unclear — call or write, we respond fastest by phone.
cennikMetaDesc: Holiday cottage rates at Domki Na Pniu in Jarosławiec — 2026 season.
cennikHeroLede: Twelve identical cottages, the same rate for everyone. No 'better' or 'worse' category, no view surcharge, no room number premium. You pay per night — everything you need is already inside.
cennikTableNote: Price is for the entire cottage, not per person. Longer stays mean better rates: 5+ nights = −5%, 10+ nights = −10%. No surprises — everything is included in the nightly rate.
cennikLoyaltyText: Returning guests — 8% off every subsequent stay
cennikLoyaltyNote: Applied automatically on reservation confirmation. No codes, no loyalty cards.
cennikIncludedNote: No electricity bill, no firewood charge, no extra for bedding and towels. Air conditioning, heating and WiFi are not extras — that's just how it should be.
cennikExtrasNote: The complete list. No asterisks, no 'service fee', no electricity added at the end of your stay. What you see here is everything.
cennikDepositBody: 500 PLN, collected on arrival (cash or BLIK). Returned in full on departure after a quick cottage check — usually takes about 15 minutes.

cennikExtras.name: Tourist tax
cennikExtras.detail: Required by law, collected on arrival

cennikExtras.name: Second car
cennikExtras.detail: First parking space included; second by reservation

cennikExtras.name: Travel cot
cennikExtras.detail: For children up to 3 years, with bedding

cennikExtras.name: Gift card
cennikExtras.detail: Stay voucher, any amount — valid 12 months

cennikSteps.body: Up to 60 days before arrival — 100% deposit refund. Between 60 and 30 days — 50%. Closer to the date the deposit transfers to another 2026 stay.

cennikSteps.title: Check-in 15:00 / 10:00

cennikSteps.meta: early / late check subject to availability

faqMetaDesc: Frequently asked questions about staying at Domki Na Pniu in Jarosławiec.
faqHeroLede: We collected the ones that come up again and again in emails and texts from past seasons. If something isn't here — Barbara picks up usually within 15 minutes, evenings included.

items.q: How do I book a stay?
items.a: The quickest way is by phone at +48 506 141 730 or by email at domkinapniu@gmail.com. After initial confirmation of the dates we send the deposit payment details — once paid, the reservation is binding.

items.q: How much is the deposit?
items.a: 30% of the total stay amount. The deposit is paid by bank transfer within 2 days of reservation confirmation. The remaining balance is settled on arrival — cash, BLIK or card.

items.q: Can I book a specific cottage?
items.a: There are twelve cottages, all identical in size, furnishings and view. We assign the number on arrival — this way there's no 'better' or 'worse' category, and the price is the same for all.

items.q: Can I book just one night?
items.a: Minimum stay varies by season: 3 nights off-season, 4–5 nights on long weekends, 7 nights in peak summer (Saturday to Saturday). See the Pricing page for details.

items.q: What happens if I cancel?
items.a: Up to 60 days before arrival — full deposit refund. Between 60 and 30 days — 50% refund. Closer to the date the deposit can be transferred to another 2026 stay, subject to availability.

items.q: Can I change my dates?
items.a: Yes, once free of charge — no later than 30 days before the original arrival date. Each subsequent change costs 100 PLN. If the season difference affects the price, we adjust accordingly.

items.q: What if the weather is bad?
items.a: Weather is not a reason for cancellation without losing the deposit — but if it rains all week, the cottage has a fireplace, books, board games, forest walks and warm tea. Summers are unpredictable.

items.q: What time can I check in?
items.a: Check-in from 15:00. We can accommodate early arrival (from 12:00) for 80 PLN — subject to availability. We always ask for a quick call before arrival, ideally an hour ahead.

items.q: What time must I check out?
items.a: By 10:00. Late checkout until 14:00 — 100 PLN, if no guests are arriving that day. In peak season this is usually not possible — many bookings run Saturday to Saturday.

items.q: Does the host live on site?
items.a: Yes — Barbara lives at the far end of the property. We welcome guests personally, show the cottage, and share tips on where to walk, eat and what to see. Reachable by phone around the clock.

items.q: Is there WiFi in the cottage?
items.a: Yes, 300 Mb/s fibre with a router in every cottage. Password on the fridge. Works well enough for remote work, video calls and streaming without interruptions.

items.q: How many guests does one cottage sleep?
items.a: Optimally 4 adults + 2 children. Master bedroom has a 160 × 200 king bed, second bedroom two 90 × 200 beds. Living room: fold-out sofa for 2. Travel cot for infants on request, free.

items.q: What is included in the price?
items.a: Linen bedding, towels, toiletries, end-of-stay cleaning, firewood, parking, WiFi, air conditioning, heating, access to pool, gazebo and playground. No electricity or water surcharges.

items.q: Is the cottage fully equipped for cooking?
items.a: Fully. Induction hob, oven, dishwasher, fridge-freezer, coffee machine, toaster, kettle, tableware for 6, basic spices and olive oil. Full meals are very possible.

items.q: Is there room for luggage, a pushchair, bikes?
items.a: Under each cottage there is an unlocked space for bikes and pushchairs; inside — a wardrobe for suitcases. Sunbeds and picnic hampers on request — let us know at check-in.

items.q: How far is the beach?
items.a: 180 metres to 'Dubai' beach — through a pine forest path, about 4 minutes on foot. Lifeguarded in season, white sand, rarely overcrowded. The cliff beach is 600 metres away.

items.q: What is there to see nearby?
items.a: Lighthouse from 1839 (800 m), Jarosławiec Waterpark (1.2 km), seaside promenade, Lake Wicko nature reserve (15 min by bike), Ustka and Darłowo (40 min by car).

items.q: Can I come by car?
items.a: Yes, parking under every cottage — one car included. Second car 20 PLN/night, with advance reservation. From Warsaw approx. 5.5 h, from Tricity — 2 h, from Poznań — 4 h.

items.q: Are there places to eat nearby?
items.a: Within walking distance: four restaurants, two fish & chip places, an ice cream shop, a small bakery with morning croissants and an organic store. Our favourite spots list is in the cottage — with a map.

items.q: Can I bring my dog?
items.a: Very welcome — many of our regular guests come with four-legged friends. Fee 40 PLN/night, one animal per cottage, pre-arranged at booking. Up-to-date health booklet required.

items.q: Is there somewhere to let the dog off-lead?
items.a: On the property — yes, it's fenced. Beyond the property please use a lead, especially near the pool and playground. 'Dubai' beach is tolerant of dogs off-season; restrictions apply in July and August.

items.q: How can I pay on arrival?
items.a: Cash, BLIK or card (no surcharge). VAT invoice on request — notify us by check-in day at the latest. Tourist tax (3.45 PLN/person/night) is settled separately, in cash.

items.q: Do you charge a security deposit?
items.a: Yes, 500 PLN — cash or BLIK on arrival. Returned in full on departure after a quick cottage check, usually about 15 minutes. If everything is in order — full amount back immediately.

galeriaMetaDesc: Photos of the cottages, interiors, beach and surroundings — Domki Na Pniu in Jarosławiec.
galeriaHeroLede: Photos taken with an ordinary camera, on ordinary days — no retouching, no rented grass. If you see a fireplace in a photo, that exact fireplace is waiting for you.

regulaminMetaTitle: Terms & Conditions — Domki Na Pniu, Jarosławiec
regulaminMetaDesc: Terms and conditions for staying at Domki Na Pniu in Jarosławiec.
regulaminHeroLede: In short: be kind to the cottage, the neighbours and the forest. The rest is formalities every accommodation must have. Full version below, printable — we're always happy to clarify if in doubt.

regulaminSections.title: General provisions
items: These Terms govern the conditions of stay at the "Domki Na Pniu" property located at ul. Morska 11, Jarosławiec (76-107), operated by Barbara Reszka — hereinafter referred to as the "Property".
Making a reservation is equivalent to reading and accepting these Terms. Failure to read the Terms does not exempt from responsibility for non-compliance.
The Host makes every effort to ensure that guests' stay at the Property is peaceful, safe and comfortable.

regulaminSections.title: Reservation
items: Reservations can be made by phone at +48 506 141 730, by email at domkinapniu@gmail.com or via the form at domkinapniu.pl.
A reservation is binding after a 30% deposit has been paid to the designated bank account within 2 days of receiving initial confirmation.
Failure to pay the deposit by the agreed deadline results in automatic cancellation without notification.
Payment of the deposit is equivalent to accepting these Terms and confirming the reservation.
The number of guests may not exceed the number declared at booking. Max. 4 adults + 2 children. An undeclared person's stay requires 80 PLN/night extra.

regulaminSections.title: Payments and deposit
items: The remaining amount is settled on arrival — cash, BLIK or card.
Tourist tax of 3.45 PLN/person/night is charged separately on arrival, pursuant to local council resolution.
A refundable security deposit of 500 PLN is collected on arrival — cash or BLIK. Returned in full on departure after inspection.
A VAT invoice is issued on request — must be notified by arrival day.
Unused portions of a paid stay do not entitle the guest to a reduction of the service fee.

regulaminSections.title: Stay day
items: The stay day begins at 15:00 on arrival day and ends at 10:00 on departure day.
Check-in and check-out take place in the presence of the Host or an authorised person.
Early check-in (from 12:00) or late check-out (until 14:00) is available subject to availability — fee 80 PLN or 100 PLN. Please arrange in advance by phone.
The key is handed over in person; in exceptional cases it may be left in the lockbox.

regulaminSections.title: Rules of use
items: Guests are required to keep the cottage and surroundings in the same state of cleanliness as on arrival, and to sort waste in the bins provided.
Smoking tobacco, using tobacco products and e-cigarettes inside the cottages is strictly prohibited. Smoking is permitted only in designated outdoor areas.
Moving furniture and beds within cottages or transferring kitchen equipment between cottages is prohibited.
Use of the firepit, BBQ and fireplace must comply with fire safety rules — away from wooden structures and under constant adult supervision.
The pool is open seasonally (15 Jun – 15 Sep) from 10:00 to 20:00. Use is at the guest's own risk; children under 12 must be accompanied by an adult.

regulaminSections.title: Quiet hours
items: During quiet hours guests must not disturb the peace of other stays. This applies to terraces, firepits and the grounds around the cottages.
In the event of a serious breach of quiet hours the Host has the right to ask guests to leave the Property without a refund.

regulaminSections.title: Pets
items: Pets are welcome — provided they are pre-arranged with the Host at booking. Fee 40 PLN/night.
We accept a maximum of 1 pet per cottage. Exceptions may be made in special cases after individual arrangement.
The owner bears full responsibility for the animal: its behaviour, cleanliness and any damage caused.
Pets must be kept on a lead on the Property grounds. Animals may not be left unsupervised if this could cause noise or damage.
An up-to-date health booklet with current vaccinations is required.

regulaminSections.title: Safety and fire protection
items: Each cottage has a fire extinguisher, smoke detector and carbon monoxide detector. The Host indicates the extinguisher location at check-in.
The use of personal electric heaters, hot plates, induction kettles and any high-power appliances not provided by the cottage is prohibited.
Candles, incense and other open-flame sources may be used only in purpose-made holders and under adult supervision.
Unjustified activation of the fire alarm or a fire extinguisher results in a charge of 500 PLN.
The Property grounds (excluding cottage interiors) are monitored — solely for the safety of guests.

regulaminSections.title: Liability
items: The guest bears full financial liability for damage or destruction of cottage furnishings caused by themselves or persons on the Property with their consent.
Parents or guardians bear full responsibility for the safety of children — especially near the pool, firepit, playground and sports court.
The Host is not liable for valuables left in the cottages or for damage arising from improper use of the equipment.
The car park is unguarded — the Host is not responsible for damage to or theft of vehicles.
A fee of 150 PLN is charged for a lost cottage key.

regulaminSections.title: Cancellation and changes
items: Cancellation more than 60 days before arrival — full deposit refund.
Cancellation 60–30 days before arrival — 50% deposit refund.
Cancellation less than 30 days before arrival — the deposit is non-refundable, but may be transferred to another 2026 stay, subject to availability.
Change of reservation dates (once, up to 30 days before the original date) is free. Each subsequent change costs 100 PLN.
The Host reserves the right to cancel in exceptional circumstances (e.g. technical failure) — in such cases the guest receives a full refund.

regulaminSections.title: Personal data (GDPR)
items: The controller of guests' personal data is Barbara Reszka, ul. Morska 11, 76-107 Jarosławiec.
Data is processed solely for the purpose of processing reservations, issuing accounting documents and fulfilling legal obligations.
Guests have the right to access, correct, restrict processing and delete their data — to the extent not covered by the controller's legal obligations.
The detailed Privacy Policy is available at domkinapniu.pl/polityka-prywatnosci and in printed form in the cottage.

regulaminSections.title: Final provisions
items: Matters not covered by these Terms are governed by the provisions of the Civil Code and the Act on Hotel Services.
The competent court for any disputes arising from the rental agreement is the court with jurisdiction for the seat of the Property.
These Terms are in force from 1 January 2026 until further notice. The current version is available at domkinapniu.pl/regulamin.
